name: Dust Mite

attacks.name: Jump Attack
attacks.tell: The mite crouches for a split second before springing straight at you.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep it or block right as its body reaches you.
attacks.notes: Their basic pack attack; modest on its own, but several chained leaps add up fast.

attacks.name: Dust Shot
attacks.tell: It sneezes or jerks its head before firing a dust ball that bursts on the ground or on the player.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge the projectile path and do not step back into the cloud immediately.
attacks.notes: The cloud slows you and drags down your offense, so ignoring it is almost always expensive.

description: A small aggressive mite that lives among lint and fibers around the shed. In groups it can turn even a short fight into an exhausting nuisance.
behavior: It gathers in swarms, patrols very specific pockets, and combines the usual mite leap with dust projectiles that leave a weakening cloud on impact.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile on sight and often chases the player surprisingly far. The real danger is letting several dust clouds stack until you are slowed and lose your attack tempo.
interactionWithCreatures: It happily attacks aphids and weevils. Near the shed, black worker and black soldier ants may even defend dust mites if you strike them nearby.
strategy: Do not let them surround you. Fresh and stabbing work very well, but the deciding factor is dodging their dust shots and thinning the group before the clouds wear you down.
respawnInfo: 2 days by default. In the Undershed it takes 3 days.
specialTraits: It is immune to dust. Its clouds reduce both movement speed and attack speed while you stay inside them.
